welcome:
👋 Welcome! Your ID: `{user_id}`

📎 Send me a link from YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Twitter, Bilibili, Spotify, or other supported platforms.

✨ I can download:
• 🎬 Videos (up to 2GB)
• 🎵 Audio (MP3)
• 🖼️ Thumbnails

Just send a link to get started!
not_authorized: 🔒 You are not authorized to use this bot.
rate_limit_exceeded: ⏳ Rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.
unsupported_url:
❌ Unsupported URL.

✅ Supported: YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Twitter, Bilibili, Spotify, and more.
what_download: 📥 What would you like to download?
no_video_found:
😕 No video found in this tweet.

Try: 🖼️ Thumbnail to get the image, or 🎵 Audio (MP3) if it's a video with audio issues.
session_expired: ⏰ Session expired. Please send the link again.
available_commands:
📋 Available commands:

/start - Start the bot
/help - Show this help
/history - Your download history
/lang - Change language

Just send a link to download!
admin_commands:
⚙️ Admin Commands

📋 General:
/start - Start the bot
/help - Show help
/history - Download history

👥 User Management:
/allow <user_id> - Allow a user
/block <user_id> - Block a user
/users - List allowed users
/broadcast <message> - Broadcast message
/userhistory <user_id> - View user history

📊 Monitoring:
/stats - Bot usage stats
/queue - Download queue status
/storage - Disk usage details
/status - Bot system status

⚡ Rate Limiting:
/rateinfo - View rate limit info
/setrate <max> [on/off] - Set rate limit

🧹 Maintenance:
/failed <user_id> - View failed downloads
/cleanup - Clean temp files
/cookie - Upload cookies file

🌐 Language:
/lang - Change language

✨ Features:
• aria2: Multi-connection downloads
• Auto cookie refresh
select_user_history: 👤 Select a user to view history:
invalid_user_id: ❌ Invalid user ID. Must be a number.
status_title:
📊 Bot Status

🖥️ CPU: {cpu}%
💾 Memory: {memory}%

📂 Temp Files: {temp_files}
📦 Temp Size: {temp_size}

⚡ Rate: {rate_limit}/hour ({rate_enabled})
🕐 Cleanup: {cleanup_interval}h
⏰ Max Age: {temp_max_age}h
invalid_cookies_filename: Invalid filename. Use format: domain_cookies.txt (e.g., www.youtube.com_cookies.txt)
invalid_language_option: Invalid language. Use: en, zh, ja, or ko
refresh_usage:
Usage: /refresh <url>

Clears cached file ID so the video will be re-downloaded.
download_complete_note: Note: This file was previously downloaded and is being sent from cache to save bandwidth.
no_subtitle_found: No subtitle found. This video may not have subtitles.
aria2_fallback: aria2 failed, falling back to yt-dlp: {error}
aria2c_no_url: Could not extract direct URL from video
error_generic: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again.
error_network: 🌐 Network error. Please check your connection.
error_server: ⚠️ Server error. Please try again later.
error_timeout: ⏱️ Request timed out. Please try again.
task_not_found: ❌ Task not found or already completed.
cancel_own_only: You can only cancel your own tasks.
cancel_failed: ❌ Cancel failed. Task may already be completed.
no_active_tasks: You have no active download tasks.
bot_shutting_down: ⚠️ Bot is shutting down, download aborted.
admin_tasks_title:
Active tasks: {active}, Queued: {queued}

Select a task to cancel:
task_cancel_error:
❌ Cancel failed. Task {task_id} does not exist or already completed.
Use /admcancel to view current active tasks.
setdisk_config:
💾 Current disk alert config:
  WARNING threshold: {warn}%
  CRITICAL threshold: {crit}%
  Check interval: {interval} min

Usage: /setdisk <warn%> [crit%]
Example: /setdisk 75 85
setdisk_invalid: ❌ Invalid parameters: warn must be < crit, both between 1-100
setdisk_updated:
✅ Disk alert thresholds updated and saved:
  WARNING: {warn}%
  CRITICAL: {crit}%
batch_limit_exceeded: ⚠️ Maximum {max} URLs supported, first {max} will be used (total {count})
subtitle: Subtitle
cookie_instruction_title: Send me your cookies.txt file to update the bot's cookies.
cookie_instruction_steps:
To generate cookies:
1. On your PC: `yt-dlp --cookies-from-browser chrome https://www.youtube.com --skip-download -o cookies.txt`

For site-specific cookies, use filename format:
• `www.youtube.com_cookies.txt` for YouTube
• `www.bilibili.com_cookies.txt` for Bilibili

The bot will automatically use the appropriate cookie file based on the URL being downloaded.
cookie_expired_error: ⚠️ Authentication failed. The bot's cookies may have expired. Please notify the admin.
format_fetch_error: ❌ Could not retrieve video information. Please try again later.
refresh_pick_prompt: 🔄 Select a cached download to force re-fetch:
disk_critical:
🚨 CRITICAL: Disk usage is {percent}%, exceeding {threshold}%!
Free: {free_gb} GB
Please clean up immediately.
disk_warning:
⚠️ WARNING: Disk usage is {percent}%, exceeding {threshold}%
Free: {free_gb} GB
disk_recovered: ✅ Disk usage back to normal at {percent}%
bill: Log an expense (text or receipt photo)
